mapper.sql: id, goods_id, goods_create_by, erp_order_id, shop_id, shop_name, shop_create_by, inventory, inventory_old, platform_id, code, msg, create_at,update_type,shop_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM synchronization_shop_log WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} ORDER BY create_at DESC

SELECT
FROM synchronization_shop_log WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} ORDER BY create_at DESC

SELECT
FROM synchronization_shop_log WHERE erp_order_id = #{erpOrderId} ORDER BY create_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE synchronization_shop_log
goods_id = #{goodsId},
goods_create_by = #{goodsCreateBy},
erp_order_id = #{erpOrderId},
shop_id = #{shopId},
shop_name = #{shopName},
shop_create_by = #{shopCreateBy},
inventory = #{inventory},
inventory_old = #{inventoryOld},
platform_id = #{platformId},
code = #{code},
msg = #{msg},
create_at = #{createAt}
WHERE id = #{id}
